description.en: A colorful crustacean with the fastest punch in the ocean and incredibly complex eyes.
description.zh: 一种色彩斑斓的甲壳动物，拥有海洋中最快的出拳速度和异常复杂的眼睛。

anatomy.en: They have rainbow-colored armor and powerful clubs. Their eyes can see 16 types of color, far more than humans.
anatomy.zh: 它们拥有彩虹色的装甲和强有力的「大锤」。它们的眼睛能看到 16 种颜色，远超人类。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Their punch is as fast as a bullet, strong enough to break glass. They use this power to smash open crabs and snails.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们的出拳速度快如子弹，强度足以击碎玻璃。它们利用这种力量砸开螃蟹和蜗牛壳。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Live in the coral reefs of the Indo-Pacific Ocean, from eastern Africa to Australia.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 生活在印度-太平洋海域的珊瑚礁中，从东非延伸至澳大利亚。
